name: Public Reference Strategic Claim Traceability Audit v1

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Hoax.ai is a governed public reference asset
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Homepage reference summary anchors governed asset framing.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Hoax.ai is a public reference system rather than a detector
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Non-detector route is the primary support target.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Hoax.ai uses evidence-risk framing
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Evidence-risk concept route supports thesis framing.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Hoax.ai has a 104-route public surface
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Integrity snapshots on homepage and strategic review align to 104 routes.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Phase 2 external-use layer exists
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Four-layer sequence links all Phase 2 routes.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Reading sequences guide reference navigation
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Reading sequences page defines navigation role.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Retrieval index organizes retrieval intent
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Retrieval index states intent-based orientation.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Citation orientation supports safe reference citation
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Citation orientation defines citation-safe role.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Source-use orientation explains source-supported reference boundaries
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Source-use orientation defines boundary role.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Retrieval walkthrough audit validated the retrieval index route
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Audit artifact supports live retrieval-index route; public trace via route itself.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Citation walkthrough audit validated citation orientation
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Live citation-orientation route is audit support surface.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Source-use walkthrough audit validated source-use orientation
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Live source-use-orientation route is audit support surface.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: External-use integrity audit validated the four-layer system
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Phase 2 layer sequence is public trace target.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Strategic reviewer surface audit validated strategic/reviewer legibility
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Strategic review hub is primary audit support surface.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Governance traceability supports inspectability without due-diligence rooms
strategic_claims_inventory.observed_issue: Governance page described traceability without explicit public cross-links to claim traceability orientation.
strategic_claims_inventory.repair_applied: Added claim traceability support section and cross-links to claim-source traceability and strategic review.
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Traceability is inspectability, not due-diligence access.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Claim-source mapping supports bounded public claims
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Claim-source traceability concept route supports mapping claims.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Publisher gates protect public surface quality
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Publisher gates are repository artifacts; public framing on governance page.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Evidence condition library provides definitional condition pages
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Evidence condition hub is visible support.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Evidence-condition crosswalk relates conditions without ranking
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Crosswalk uses relation-safe language.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Route groups organize public surface structurally
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Route group pages are structural shelves.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Audience paths orient readers without workflows
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Audience paths state non-workflow role.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Strategic maturity is shown through reference structure
strategic_claims_inventory.observed_issue: Strategic review index lacked explicit claim-to-support traceability orientation.
strategic_claims_inventory.repair_applied: Added strategic claim traceability section with support route links.
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Maturity via structure, not sales solicitation.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Source Confidence is support-type language, not a confidence score
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Source Confidence concept defines support type.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Hoax.ai is non-verification and non-proof in public framing
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Boundary pages negate proof and verification drift.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Strategic review is non-transactional
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Explicit non-transactional boundary on strategic review.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Reviewer packet organizes inspection without private data rooms
strategic_claims_inventory.observed_issue: Reviewer packet integrity snapshot did not state how packet claims trace to support routes.
strategic_claims_inventory.repair_applied: Added claim traceability line linking public surface index and Phase 2 layer.
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Packet is public inspection, not private data room.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: System map orients strategic structure without dashboards
strategic_claims_inventory.observed_issue: System map did not link strategic claims to traceability orientation surfaces.
strategic_claims_inventory.repair_applied: Added strategic claim traceability cross-links in system map depth.
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: System map is orientation, not dashboard.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Retrieval and citation strategic claims trace to Phase 2 routes
strategic_claims_inventory.observed_issue: Retrieval-and-citation page did not name walkthrough-validated Phase 2 support routes.
strategic_claims_inventory.repair_applied: Added Phase 2 walkthrough-validated surface links in index purpose.
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Audits trace to live routes, not certification.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Citation and retrieval map claims trace to Phase 2 support
strategic_claims_inventory.observed_issue: Citation map packet purpose did not state claim traceability to Phase 2 routes.
strategic_claims_inventory.repair_applied: Added traceability sentence with Phase 2 route links in packet purpose.
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Map is citation orientation, not sales proof.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Public reference asset claims trace to executive and strategic layers
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Executive overview explains reference system asset.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: Walkthrough scenarios validate integrity without certification
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Traceability section states audits are integrity checks.

strategic_claims_inventory.claim_text: AI agents should cite strategic claims only when support targets exist
strategic_claims_inventory.ai_agent_note: Strategic traceability orientation supports AI citation discipline.
